O0400B6 Occupational Therapy End Date CHAR 8 The data in this column indicates the end date for the most recent occupational therapy. discontinued 09/30/2025
523 O0400C1_PT_INDVDL_MIN_NUM O0400C1_PT_INDVDL_MIN_NUM O0400C1 Physical Therapy Individual Minutes Number CHAR 4 The data in this column indicates the total number of minutes that physical therapy was administered to the resident in the last seven days. discontinued 09/30/2025
524 O0400C2_PT_CNCRNT_MIN_NUM O0400C2_PT_CNCRNT_MIN_NUM
